title: New Time tracking column icons - hardly visible
excerpt:
Hello dear Monday support team and community , all our company Monday users are complaining for that New Time tracking column icons are hardly visible. 
Please consider an option to return old icon back or make icons big…

posts.author: well1985 (Valentine)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello dear Monday support team and community , all our company Monday users are complaining for that New Time tracking column icons are hardly visible.
Please consider an option to return old icon back or make icons bigger ( or in different colour as now it is hard to see which timer is running and which is not )

image3642×1413 440 KB

posts.author: Brookolyn (Brooke)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree, this used to be gray and now in the last few days it’s changed to be where we can’t even see if we are tracking our time our not. This has caused issues within our company using Monday.com

posts.author: CHOCM (Christopher Herndon)
posts.cookedHtml:
I also submitted feed back for this, this is a big issue for us.

My temporary solution for this was to add conditional formatting to the cell that has time running, changing it to red. Maybe that will help until Monday fixes this issue.

posts.author: well1985 (Valentine)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for a good idea - will try to use
As for now we use custom css ( it removed blue background for a button )

image726×459 47.2 KB

posts.author: lmoran (Lauralee Moran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ditto! I have a couple of members on my team who have a difficult time seeing. The other icons were much easier to discern between on/off, so this change has made it harder for them to work.
I liked the suggestion by another user to set conditional formatting on the cell, however that’s not an option on the table widget.
Hope that y’all can make an adjustment soon. Thanks!
